calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandate And Declaratory Judgment (First And Second Causes Of Action); Declaration Of Stephen Bingham; Declaration Of Oren M. Sellstrom; R
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren M. Sellstrom, Esq. of LAWYERS' COMMITTEE FOR CIVIL RIGHTS OF SFBA 543-9444, for petitioners Michael Randolph McMahan and Randall Kalal, moving for issuance of peremptory writ of mandate and declaratory judgment
Stephen Bingham, Esq. of BAY AREA LEGAL AID 982-1300, X-316, also for petitioners
Wayne K. Snodgrass, Esq. of DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-4675, for respondents CCSF, Dept. of Human Services of the City & County of San Francisco, and Trent Rhorer, Director of Dept. of DHS, opposing the motion

Ruling:
ARGUED and the Court denied PETITIONERS MICHAEL MCMAHAN and RANDALL KALAL'S Motion For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandate And Declaratory Judgment (First And Second Causes Of Action). The Court ordered parties to submit one proposed order reflecting the Court's ruling on or before 12/31/03. (302/KMM/PB) JUDGE: KEVIN M. MCCARTHY, CSR: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840
